description_long: This hamburger features a round, golden-brown sesame seed bun with a scattering of sesame seeds on the top surface. The bun is thick and slightly domed, sandwiching a visibly juicy, dark brown beef patty at its center. Above the patty, there are thin layers of green lettuce, red tomato, and possibly a slice of cheese, all peeking out from the edge of the bun. The ingredients are neatly stacked, with the toppings forming a colorful ring just beneath the top bun. The surface of the bun appears soft and slightly matte, with a gentle sheen from the seeds. The overall appearance is appetizing and classic, resembling a standard hamburger found in urban fast food settings.
description: A classic hamburger with a sesame seed bun, visible beef patty, and colorful toppings layered neatly beneath the top bun.
description_view_0: The hamburger is shown with a clear view of the sesame seed bun, visible layers of lettuce, tomato, and patty, with toppings peeking out evenly.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rounded bun and the even distribution of sesame seeds, with the toppings and patty still visible but slightly less pronounced.
description_view_2: The hamburger appears more compressed, with the patty and toppings less distinct, and the bun's texture more prominent.
description_view_3: The bun's seam is visible, and the toppings form a thin, colorful line beneath the top bun, with the patty's edge clearly defined.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Toppings are arranged in thin, even layers above the patty, with green lettuce, red tomato, and possibly cheese forming a colorful ring beneath the top bun.
